arts.ttl: 'Tottenham offered me a contract – then I got in taxi they paid for and joined Arsenal'
arts.sum: Things could have played out very differently for Arsenal in the late-1990s if Emmanuel Petit had joined Tottenham instead, but the Frenchman made a brutal decision to snub the Lilywhites

arts.ttl: Tamworth player racially abused after Spurs loss
arts.sum: Tamworth player Chris Wreh made himself unavailable for the club's match against Boldmere St Michaels on Tuesday after their response to the racist abuse he suffered following their FA Cup defeat to Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham: Five classic north London derbies
arts.sum: Before Arsenal host Tottenham on Wednesday, here are five classic Premier League encounters that should whet the appetite.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dream midfield after Zubimendi transfer with one player moved on
arts.sum: However, after reports surfaced that suggest Arsenal have beaten Liverpool and Real Madrid to reaching an agreement with Martin Zubimendi, it makes more sense than it might initially seem. Arsenal dream midfield with Martin Zubimendi

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand wants to confront Mikel Arteta at North London Derby with one question
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will hope to rejuvenate Arsenal's season at home to Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday following their FA Cup elimination at the hands of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'miss out' on January target with switch to European giants 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur allegedly suffer a transfer blow, as Juventus agree a deal to sign Paris Saint-Germain's Randal Kolo Muani on loan.

arts.ttl: Player snubs transfer to Tottenham – Not even prepared to take notice of Spurs’ arguments
arts.sum: On Tuesday, L’Equipe reported Tottenham Hotspur have made advances in their efforts to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani. It was also stated Spurs chairman Daniel Levy has held talks with PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi. The same newspaper then explained Tottenham made an offer to sign the 26-year-old on loan with an obligation to buy. arts.ttl: “Now convinced” – Fabrizio Romano delivers important update on Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has stated that Barcelona are “now convinced” they’ll be keeping defender Ronald Araujo this January despite speculation over his future. The Uruguay international has mostly been a key player for Barca in recent years, but there are also other options in defence and it seems that led to some doubt about his situation. arts.ttl: Granit Xhaka shows true Arsenal colours with three-word message after Gabriel Jesus injury blow
arts.sum: Former Arsenal captain Granit Xhaka has sent his heartfelt best wishes to Gabriel Jesus after the Brazilian suffered an anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury against Manchester United at the weekend. "Wishing you all the best with your recovery, Gabby," the social media post from Arsenal's official account began.
